[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 110001111 6
2 100001011 4
3 001000011 3
4 001010100 3
5 011010110 5
6 110101111 7
7 111010011 6
